selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the potential sources and types of fake content, as well as the methods used to spread them. One must also be mindful of the psychological effects of consuming fake news and take steps to protect their mental health. Additionally, it is important to be an active participant in online discourse and fact-checking initiatives, and to support organizations that promote media literacy and critical thinking. By taking these steps, individuals can contribute to creating a more informed and discerning online community, and help to combat the spread of misinformation.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, one must understand its sources and types, be mindful of psychological effects, and actively participate in fact-checking initiatives. By taking these steps, individuals can contribute to creating a more informed online community and combat misinformation.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the potential sources and types of fake content, as well as the methods used to spread them. One must also be mindful of the psychological effects of consuming fake news and take steps to protect their mental health. Additionally, it is important to be an active participant in online discourse and fact-checking initiatives, and to support organizations that promote media literacy and critical thinking. By taking these steps, individuals can contribute to creating a more informed and discerning online community, and help to combat the spread of misinformation.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, one must understand its sources and types, be mindful of psychological effects, and actively participate in fact-checking initiatives. By taking these steps, individuals can contribute to creating a more informed online community and combat misinformation.
